reply: (1) This device is an AutomationDirect GS10 Variable Frequency Drive, used to control motor speed. (2) The most likely cause of the keypad showing dashes and not responding is a power issue or a drive itself being faulty. (3) The tech should check the power supply to the drive and ensure it's within the specified range (208-240VAC). If the power is correct, the next step is to reset the drive or consult the manual for troubleshooting steps.
